task: Create a JSON configuration for an AWS Lambda function that processes S3 bucket events and triggers when a new file is uploaded
solution_criteria: Must include valid AWS Lambda resource configuration, specify S3 bucket trigger event, include runtime and handler information

task: Write a Python function to filter and transform a list of AWS EC2 instance details, returning only running instances with their public IP addresses
solution_criteria: Function should use list comprehension or filter(), handle potential missing data, return clean list of running instance details

task: Create a regular expression to validate AWS resource naming conventions for S3 bucket names (lowercase, no spaces, 3-63 characters)
solution_criteria: Regex must enforce AWS S3 bucket naming rules: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, 3-63 characters long, cannot start/end with hyphen
